name: Bicouplet 2
description: A descending 12-9-6 snatch-and-bar-muscle-up couplet at a heavier load than Bicouplet 1.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2018/11 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; separately scored from Bicouplet 1, beginning after a 1-minute transition
